tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road 2023 Year-End Report

payload.title: MTA LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD 2023 YEAR-END REPORT

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Commuter railroad serving Long Island, New York

tool_args.label: 2023 Capital and Other Reimbursements Revenue Actual

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
payload.missing_information: Final audited results not yet available

payload.claim_text: LIRR's Cash Deficit of $1,009.9 million was $149.9 million lower than the Final Estimate, primarily due to lower payroll expenses as a result of revised wage assumptions and the existence of vacancies, overtime, Other Post Employee Benefits (OPEB) current payment, electric expenditures, materials, professional services, and the timing of maintenance services.
payload.description: Explanation of cash deficit variance drivers

payload.claim_text: Total Capital and Other Reimbursements was favorable to the Final Estimate by $3.9 million or 1.0%, primarily due to higher project work for Grand Central Madison, 3rd Track Expansion, and NYS DOT work related to Van Wyck Expressway.
payload.description: Capital projects driving reimbursable variance vs Final Estimate

tool_args.label: Reimbursable capital project references - Adopted Budget

payload.claim_text: Total Capital and Other Reimbursements was favorable to the Adopted Budget by $13.2 million or 3.5%, primarily due to project work for Grand Central Madison, 3rd Track Expansion, Annual Track Program, and NYS DOT work related to Van Wyck Expressway.
payload.description: Capital projects driving reimbursable variance vs Adopted Budget

tool_args.label: GCMCOC expenses included in LIRR indicators

payload.claim_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCOC) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.
payload.description: Note that GCMCOC expenses are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations

tool_args.label: LIRR entity has cash deficit metric
LIRR entity has operating revenues metric
